data.body: Broaden scope: the tracker .gitignore also omits .graph-cache.json (the graph/deps compile cache), observed as an untracked file in the .tickets-tracker worktree after running `rebar deps`/`show` in this same non-interactive environment (Python 3.11.15, bash 5.2.21, Linux 6.18.5; rebar run via PYTHONPATH=src). Same root cause as the write-lock files: _GITIGNORE in src/rebar/_commands/init.py does not cover all runtime artifacts. Fix should ignore .ticket-write.lock, .ticket-write.lock.d/, AND .graph-cache.json (ideally derive the cache/lock names from their defining constants so the ignore list cannot drift).
